zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Welling於1413年出生在英國素福爾可拉文哈姆時，她的父親Robert Richard Welling26歲，母親Elizabeth Lavenham21歲。她於大約1434年與John Appleton在英國英格蘭素福爾可蕾托 瓦爾迪費爾德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1468年7月4日在英國英格蘭素福爾可蕾托 瓦爾迪費爾德享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Welling于1413年出生在英国素福爾可拉文哈姆时，她的父亲Robert Richard Welling26岁，母亲Elizabeth Lavenham21岁。她于大约1434年与John Appleton在英国英格兰素福爾可蕾托 瓦爾迪費爾德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1468年7月4日在英国英格兰素福爾可蕾托 瓦爾迪費爾德享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Welling
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Welwyn (Hertfordshire) or Welling in Bexley (Kent), with a suspicion of an alternative unidentified source. The Hertfordshire placename means ‘at the willow trees’, from Old English wel(i)gum, dative plural form of welig ‘willow’. The Kent placename may derive from Old English wella ‘well, spring, stream’ + the placename forming suffix -ing. In some cases this name may represent a development of Llewellyn , particularly near the Welsh border.
German: habitational name from any of various places in the Rhineland called Welling or Wellingen.

variants.name: Wellings
meanings: English (Shropshire and Staffordshire): variant of Welling , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Llywelyn, derived from British Celtic Lugubelinos, itself from the divine name Lugus + an uncertain second element often used alone as a name. Through association with llew ‘lion’, it was altered to Llewelyn. This was the name of two princes of north Wales who held the Normans at bay for many years in the 13th century. Etymologically speaking, the form with a fourth -l- is an error, not found as an original Welsh name, but this is now much the most common spelling in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Welling was born in 1413, in Lavenham, Suffolk, England, her father, Robert Richard Welling, was 26 and her mother, Elizabeth Lavenham, was 21. She married John Appleton about 1434, in Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 4 July 1468, in Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Welling est née en 1413, à Lavenham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert Richard Welling, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Lavenham, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé John Appleton environ 1434, à Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 4 juillet 1468, à Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Wellingが1413年にイギリススフォルクラベンハムで生まれた時，父Robert Richard Wellingは26歳，母Elizabeth Lavenhamは21歳であった。約1434年にイギリスイギリススフォルクリットル ワルディングフィールドでJohn Appletonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1468年7月4日にイギリスイギリススフォルクリットル ワルディングフィールドで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Welling(이)가 1413년 영국 수폴크 레이븐함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Richard Welling(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Lavenham(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1434년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 리틀 월딩필드에서 John Appleton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1468년 7월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 리틀 월딩필드에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Welling родилась в 1413 г. в местности лавенам, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Richard Welling было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Lavenham, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Appleton около 1434 г. в местности литл валдингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 4 июля 1468 г. в местности литл валдингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет.
